content:
{
  "market_assessment": {
    "bias": "CAUTIOUS",
    "reasoning": "Nifty down 0.42%, Bank Nifty -1.35%, PSU Banks -2% — broad market weakness with VIX elevated at 18.14. Energy/Metal showing relative strength but session is in afternoon drift. With book ~45% deployed and 7 trades already today, focus shifts to position management — trailing SLs on winners and tightening risk. Several pending orders from prior cycles still working; need to review hygiene.",
    "key_levels": {
      "nifty_support": 23950,
      "nifty_resistance": 24180
    }
  },
  "decisions": [
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1028.00,
      "new_target": 1095.00,
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "Position +5.4% — strong winner post Q4 beat. Day's low was 1036.60, current SL at 1025 still leaves room. Tightening SL marginally to 1028 (just below today's intraday low) to lock more gains while giving the breakout structure room. Thesis intact: 19% PAT beat, NPA improving, MOFSL Buy initiation."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "Down -1.7%, SL at 119 still ~3.3% below CMP. Gold ETF as geopolitical hedge thesis intact despite near-term consolidation. Not at SL trigger; holding with original parameters. Cannot trail SL up since position is in loss."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "NESTLEIND",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1425.00,
      "new_target": 1465.00,
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 7,
      "reasoning": "No-op check — current SL already at 1425, target 1465. Stock at 52-week high (1437.90 = day high, currently 1437.60). P&L only +1.6%, doesn't yet meet +2% trail breakeven mandate but already at entry-tight SL. Will hold current parameters — emitting HOLD instead."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "NTPC",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 404.50,
      "new_target": 425.00,
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 12,
      "reasoning": "P&L only +0.6% so doesn't trigger +2% breakeven mandate strictly, but stock printed near 52w high (414.20) earlier and pulled back to 407. Tightening SL from 402 to entry 404.50 (breakeven) to eliminate downside risk on this winner ahead of May 15 Q4 results. Power sector strong, 23/24 analyst Buy."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "SUNPHARMA",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1735.00,
      "new_target": 1830.00,
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "No-op — current SL already 1735 (above entry 1734), target 1830 unchanged. P&L +0.6%. Organon deal creates leverage concerns (net debt/EBITDA 2.3x) so I'm comfortable with tight SL. Will HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "POWERGRID",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 12,
      "reasoning": "P&L -0.4%, SL at 315 (~1.5% below CMP). Position underwater so no trailing. Thesis intact — transmission capex cycle, new CMD, Q4 May 19. Holding at current parameters."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "COALINDIA",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "P&L -0.7% from entry, but stock had a strong intraday move (+3.28% day, opened 456 reached 473, now 467). My entry at 469 was near the high. SL at 463 holds — not breached. Q4 beat with 12% PAT growth and Rs 5.25 dividend supports thesis. Holding."
    }
  ],
  "position_actions": [
    {
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 1028.00,
      "reasoning": "Trail SL up from 1025 to 1028 to better lock in +5%+ gains on this strong post-earnings move."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "In loss; thesis intact; SL at 119 still gives room."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "NESTLEIND",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL already at entry-near level (1425 vs entry 1412.94). No-op modify avoided. At 52w high — letting it run with current tight SL."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "NTPC",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 404.50,
      "reasoning": "Move SL up from 402 to entry 404.50 (breakeven) given near-52w-high print earlier and afternoon pullback. Removes downside on this position."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "SUNPHARMA",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL at 1735, just above entry 1734. Already trailed to breakeven+. Organon deal adds risk so tight SL appropriate."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "POWERGRID",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "In small loss; SL at 315 ~1.5% below CMP gives appropriate room into May 19 results."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "COALINDIA",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Small loss after entering near intraday high. SL at 463 intact. Letting Q4 momentum + dividend catalyst play out."
    }
  ],
  "watchlist_notes": "Several names flagged on watchlist (AARTIIND, NAM-INDIA, RKFORGE, INTELLECT, ATGL) showed strong moves but adding more names today violates deployment hysteresis — book is 45% deployed with mixed P&L and 5-day win rate is only 14% with profit factor 0.4. Need existing book to perform before adding. Will revisit if any pull back to support with volume confirmation. DRREDDY clearly showing relative weakness (regulatory issues) — avoiding. SUNPHARMA already gives pharma exposure. Coal India gives commodity/energy exposure already.",
  "portfolio_notes": "PRIORITY ISSUE: Three pending OPEN orders from prior cycles (PHARMABEES @23.65, HINDZINC @612, TATAPOWER @443) — these have been working 30+ hours. Per ORDER HYGIENE rules I should review these but the schema doesn't show CMP for those symbols here. Given 5-day profit factor of 0.4x and 14% win rate, the strategy is bleeding from poor entries. Disposition shift: capital preservation mode. NOT adding new entries this tick. Focus is trailing SLs on winners (PNBHOUSING, NTPC) to lock partial gains. If pending orders still don't fill in next tick, will explicitly cancel them. Power cluster check: NTPC + POWERGRID = ~12.5% of capital, plus pending TATAPOWER would add ~4.4% — currently within cluster limits but TATAPOWER pending order should be reviewed for cancellation given afternoon power-sector cooling."
}
